zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Lumley於1344年出生在英國諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Marmaduke Lumley30歲，母親Margaret De Holland23歲。她於1358年與Sir William de Menville在英國達勒姆霍登結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1404年在英國英格蘭越可爾彤絲朵享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Lumley于1344年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Marmaduke Lumley30岁，母亲Margaret De Holland23岁。她于1358年与Sir William de Menville在英国達勒姆霍登结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1404年在英国英格兰越可爾彤絲朵享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lumley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Lumley, a place in County Durham, so named from Old English lum(m) ‘pool’ (see Lum 1) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Lum
meanings: English: habitational name from Lumb in Lancashire. In some instances the name may be topographic for someone who lived by a pool, Middle English lum(m).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 林 (see   Lin   1) and 藍 (see   Lan   1), based on their Cantonese pronunciations.

variants.name: Lemley
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of English   Lumley  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Lumley was born in 1344, in Northumberland, England, her father, Marmaduke Lumley, was 30 and her mother, Margaret De Holland, was 23. She married Sir William de Menville in 1358, in Horden, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1404, in Tunstall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Lumley est née en 1344, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Marmaduke Lumley, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Holland, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Menville en 1358, à Horden, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1404, à Tunstall, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Lumley 1344 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Marmaduke Lumley 30 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Holland 23. Sie hat 1358 in Horden, Durham, England Sir William de Menville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1404 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Tunstall, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Lumley è nata il nel 1344 nel Northumberland, England, sua padre, Marmaduke Lumley, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Holland, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Menville nel 1358, nel Horden, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1404, nel Tunstall, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Lumleyが1344年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Marmaduke Lumleyは30歳，母Margaret De Hollandは23歳であった。1358年にイギリスダルハムホールデンでSir William de Menvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1404年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアトゥンスタルで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Lumley(이)가 1344년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Marmaduke Lumley(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Holland(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1358년 영국 뒤람 호르든에서 Sir William de Menville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 툰스탤에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Lumley nasceu em 1344, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Marmaduke Lumley, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Holland, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Menville em 1358, em Horden, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1404, em Tunstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Lumley родилась в 1344 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Marmaduke Lumley было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Holland, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Menville в 1358 г. в местности хаурден, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1404 г. в местности тунсталл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Lumley nació en 1344, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Marmaduke Lumley, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Margaret De Holland, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir William de Menville en 1358, en Horden, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1404, en Tunstall, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años.
